testcase.name: test_admin_login

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbkBuZXdtZS5jb20iLCJyb2xlIjoic3VwZXJhZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3MjQyNzA3Nn0.Q9LKmDQlACwVBmUNpuudDD0ptfBN9hdahT0roYIyL0o', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'email': 'admin@newme.com', 'id': '69a3c46bc84ebc62829e39a6', 'role': 'superadmin', 'username': 'admin'}} or None == True) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9afa8170dc0>('success') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9afa8170dc0> = {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbkBuZXdtZS5jb20iLCJyb2xlIjoic3VwZXJhZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3MjQyNzA3Nn0.Q9LKmDQlACwVBmUNpuudDD0ptfBN9hdahT0roYIyL0o', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'email': 'admin@newme.com', 'id': '69a3c46bc84ebc62829e39a6', 'role': 'superadmin', 'username': 'admin'}}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_newme.py:74: in test_admin_login assert "token" in data or data.get("success") == True E AssertionError: assert ('token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbkBuZXdtZS5jb20iLCJyb2xlIjoic3VwZXJhZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3MjQyNzA3Nn0.Q9LKmDQlACwVBmUNpuudDD0ptfBN9hdahT0roYIyL0o', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'email': 'admin@newme.com', 'id': '69a3c46bc84ebc62829e39a6', 'role': 'superadmin', 'username': 'admin'}} or None == True) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9afa8170dc0>('success') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9afa8170dc0> = {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbkBuZXdtZS5jb20iLCJyb2xlIjoic3VwZXJhZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3MjQyNzA3Nn0.Q9LKmDQlACwVBmUNpuudDD0ptfBN9hdahT0roYIyL0o', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'email': 'admin@newme.com', 'id': '69a3c46bc84ebc62829e39a6', 'role': 'superadmin', 'username': 'admin'}}.get
